name: npu-image-editor
title: NPU Image Editor
description: High-performance image editing using Windows Copilot Runtime and NPU.
author: user

commands.name: modify-image
commands.title: Modify Image
commands.description: All image tools - file list with full action panel.

commands.name: remove-background
commands.title: Remove Background
commands.description: NPU: remove background from selected Explorer images.

commands.name: make-sticker
commands.title: Make Sticker
commands.description: NPU: crop to subject, transparent bg, 480x480 WebP.

commands.name: extract-text
commands.title: Extract Text (OCR)
commands.description: Extract text from selected Explorer images.

preferences.name: autoOpenTxt
preferences.description: Automatically open the .txt file in the default editor after extraction.
preferences.title: Auto Open File
preferences.label: Open .txt file after extraction

preferences.name: defaultJpegQuality
preferences.title: Default JPEG Quality
preferences.description: Pre-filled quality (1–100) for the Optimize action.

preferences.name: clipboardOutputDir
preferences.title: Clipboard Image Output
preferences.description: Where to save images processed from clipboard. Defaults to Desktop.
